archimate:Assessment.name: Key Behavioural IoP Enablers
archimate:Assessment.documentation:
Definition: Key Behavioural IoP Enablers ABB is a Groping enabling the exchange of capabilities with internal and external peers to achieve the expected public administration outcomes.
Source: ISA2-EIF
Source reference: https://ec.europa.eu/isa2/eif_en/
Interoperability Dimension: Behavioral IoP
Viewpoint: Key Interoperability Enablers viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyBehaviouralIoPEnablersAssessment
ABB name: eira:KeyBehaviouralIoPEnablersAssessment
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyBehaviouralIoPEnablersAssessment
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: Key Behavioural IoP Enablers ABB is a Groping enabling the exchange of capabilities with internal and external peers to achieve the expected public administration outcomes.
